body: PT Permodalan Nasional Madani, a non-bank financing institution, has issued a medium-term sukuk mudharabah worth IDR 262 billion with a floating yield to be distributed every three months for 3 years. The sukuk, registered with the Indonesia Central Security Depository, will mature on October 11, 2027, with PT Bank Syariah Indonesia TBK appointed as the trustee for this issuance.
title: PT Permodalan Nasional Madani Issues IDR 262 Billion Medium-Term Sukuk Mudharabah

body: PT MD Entertainment TBK's shareholders have approved a plan to acquire over 50% of PT Net Visi Media TBK, the managing company of Net TV, for IDR 1.65 trillion, equivalent to 98.71% of its equity as of April 2024. The company will also issue up to 951.12 million new shares, or 10% of its paid-up capital, through a private placement to fund the acquisition.
title: PT MD Entertainment to Acquire Over 50% Stake in PT Net Visi Media, Entering Television Broadcast Business
